prompt_head:
Extract ALL line items from this Invoice document.
Return a JSON array of objects with: line_no, item_description, quantity, unit_price, line_total
RULES:
- quantity is a COUNT (small number like 1, 2, 5, 10, 100)
- unit_price is COST PER ITEM (£ amount)
- line_total: extract the ACTUAL value from the document, do NOT compute
- Stop at Subtotal/Tax/Total rows — those are NOT line items
- Return ONLY the JSON array, nothing else

Document:
INVOICE PERRY
LTD
Date Issued: 27/09/2024 Invoice No: 148769
Billed to: Assurity Ltd PO No: 526689
10 Redkiln Way Horsham
West Sussex RH13 5QH

Faber-Castell A4 Ruled £10.10 100 £1,010.00
Pilot Ballpoint Pen £17.89 20 £357.80
Sub-Total £2,826.65
T
prompt_tail:
it_price is COST PER ITEM (£ amount)
- line_total: extract the ACTUAL value from the document, do NOT compute
- Stop at Subtotal/Tax/Total rows — those are NOT line items
- Return ONLY the JSON array, nothing else
